segments.text: listen, and then answer the question.
Traffic police are sometimes very polite.

translations.zh-Hans: 交通警察有时非常客气。

segments.text: During a holiday in Sweden, I found this note on my car.

translations.zh-Hans: 在瑞典度假期间，我在自己的汽车上发现了这张字条。

segments.text: Sir, we welcome you to our city.

translations.zh-Hans: “先生，欢迎您来到我们的城市。

segments.text: This is a no parking area.
You will enjoy your stay here if you pay attention to our street signs.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果您留意我们的街道标志，您在这里会过得很愉快。

segments.text: This note is only a reminder.

translations.zh-Hans: 这张字条只是一个提醒。”

segments.text: If you receive a request like this, you cannot fail to obey it.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果你收到这样的要求，就不可能不遵守。
